lessons.title: What is a Loop? 🔁
lessons.description: Don't repeat yourself! Make the computer do the hard work.

lessons.title: The 'for' Loop 🤖
lessons.description: Learn the most common way to iterate exactly as many times as you need.

lessons.title: The 'while' Loop ⏳
lessons.description: Keep repeating an action as long as a condition is true.

lessons.title: The 'do...while' Loop 🛡️
lessons.description: The loop that guarantees it will run at least once before checking.

lessons.title: Break & Continue 🛑
lessons.description: Take full control over your loops by skipping or escaping them.
